name: Italian Tortellini Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 medium zucchini, cut into 1 inch cubes
15 ounce can Great Northern beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except tortellini in a crock pot.
2. Mix well.
3. Cover and cook on Low setting for at least 6 hours.
4. When ready to serve, increase the heat to High setting.
5. Add tortellini.
6. Cook for an additional 20 minutes or until tortellini are soft.
